overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a futuristic neon-lit commercial plaza at night. The scene features cyberpunk architecture with cyan and magenta neon lighting, reflective surfaces, digital billboards, and scattered pedestrians browsing the area.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with white benches

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered walkway past white benches and cyan neon trim

notable_agents.action: person sitting on white bench facing the walkway

entered.detail: futuristic white curved benches lining the right side of the walkway
continuous cyan neon light strips running along the wall edges
highly polished white tile floor reflecting the neon lights
transparent glass safety railing along the right edge

segments.scene_description: Walking through a covered cyberpunk walkway with white benches and cyan neon trim. The floor is highly reflective white tile, and a person sits on a bench to the right while sparse pedestrians walk in the opposing direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with upper walkway and trees

events.description: corridor opens into wider plaza revealing upper walkway with pink umbrellas

agents.ego_description: continuing forward as the space opens up to a multi-level plaza with planted trees

entered.detail: pink and white umbrellas on the upper level walkway visible overhead
large tree planted in the center of the plaza walkway
tall vertical neon light strips mounted on the left wall

segments.scene_description: The corridor opens into a wider plaza area with trees planted in the walkway and an upper level visible with pink umbrellas. Vertical light fixtures line the left wall as the camera moves through the more open space.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial strip with shops and outdoor cafes

events.description: entering commercial area with large digital billboards and storefronts

agents.ego_description: walking past commercial storefronts and outdoor seating areas

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red hat walking past the camera toward the foreground

entered.detail: large illuminated advertisement board displaying NICOLA brand with female model
green neon sign reading ATTERHORNE above a shop entrance
large white umbrellas shading outdoor seating areas

segments.scene_description: Walking through a commercial area featuring the NICOLA advertisement board and ATTERHORNE neon sign. Outdoor cafe seating with umbrellas lines the right side, and a pedestrian in a red hat passes by on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: central plaza with circular bar and tree

events.description: approaching the central circular bar structure built around a tree

agents.ego_description: approaching and circling the central bar area, observing the bartender and surroundings

notable_agents.action: bartender standing behind the circular counter preparing drinks

entered.detail: futuristic circular white bar counter wrapping around a central tree with cyan lighting
large mature tree growing through the center of the circular bar structure
building facade with distinctive black and white checkerboard pattern and neon signage

segments.scene_description: Approaching a distinctive circular bar built around a large central tree. The area features a checkerboard-patterned building facade and various neon advertisements. A bartender stands behind the counter as the camera circles the structure, with patrons seated at the bar.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a futuristic commercial district that evolves from a narrow, sterile corridor into a vibrant, open-air social hub. It begins by gliding through a covered walkway characterized by reflective white tiles and cyan neon trim, passing sparse pedestrians and minimalist white benches. As the corridor opens, the space expands into a wider plaza where greenery appears in the walkways and pink umbrellas become visible on an upper level. The camera then shifts into a bustling commercial zone, passing under the glow of Nicola and Atterhorne neon signs and moving past outdoor cafe seating and passing pedestrians. Finally, the movement culminates at a distinctive circular bar built around a large central tree, circling the structure to reveal a checkerboard facade and patrons gathered around the bartender.
